body:
I think the protobuf dependency on this needs to be pinned to >=5.0.0,<6.0.0.

Trying to run the Storage Write API with `pip install z3-target-bigquery` results in an error:

```
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File ".../.virtualenvs/target-bigquery/lib/python3.9/site-packages/target_bigquery/proto_gen.py", line 82, in proto_schema_factory_v2
[2025-08-04 15:45:21,333][prefect.task_runs][INFO] - PID 31658 stream output:
    proto_descriptor = factory.pool.FindMessageTypeByName(clsname)
KeyError: "Couldn't find message net.proto2.python.public.target_bigquery.AnonymousProto_2773e8065615d190e47e6f1714e056f753602868"
```

Installing from provided poetry.lock works ok.

I ended up doing the following to solve it for the time being:

```
pip install z3-target-bigquery "protobuf>=5.0.0,<6.0.0"
```
title: storage_write_api not working with vanilla pip install (needs protobuf<6)
